personal.name: Shashi Kumar Singh
personal.title: Lead DevOps Engineer | Platform Architect | Site Reliability Engineering Leader

summary: Senior DevOps and Platform Engineering leader with 7+ years of experience designing scalable cloud infrastructure, Kubernetes platforms, and high-reliability distributed systems. Proven track record of building Internal Developer Platforms (IDP), implementing GitOps pipelines, and architecting hybrid multi-cloud environments across AWS, GCP, and Azure. Experienced in leading DevOps teams, improving developer productivity, and implementing Site Reliability Engineering practices to achieve 99.99% system uptime.

responsibilities: Led a cross-functional team of 8 DevOps and SRE engineers delivering enterprise cloud platform capabilities.
Architected a centralized Internal Developer Platform (IDP) enabling self-service infrastructure provisioning.
Reduced developer environment provisioning time by 90% through automation.
Designed hybrid multi-cloud infrastructure across AWS and GCP supporting high-traffic workloads.
Implemented self-healing infrastructure automation improving platform reliability to 99.99% uptime.
Established architectural standards for scalable microservices infrastructure.
Led migration of legacy monolithic financial systems to microservices architecture using AWS EKS.
Designed secure CI/CD pipelines compliant with PCI-DSS security requirements.
Implemented automated disaster recovery strategies ensuring business continuity for payment systems.
Improved deployment reliability using containerized infrastructure and infrastructure as code.
Developed infrastructure automation scripts using Python and Ansible.
Managed Linux server infrastructure supporting high throughput enterprise systems.
Automated system configuration and patching workflows improving operational efficiency.

projects.name: Enterprise Internal Developer Platform
projects.impact: Enabled self-service infrastructure provisioning for development teams reducing onboarding time by 90%.
projects.description: Designed and implemented an enterprise developer platform providing standardized infrastructure templates, automated environment provisioning, and centralized developer tooling.

projects.name: Hybrid Multi-Cloud Landing Zone
projects.impact: Enabled scalable multi-region infrastructure supporting active-active traffic routing.
projects.description: Architected a secure cloud landing zone with governance policies, organizational security controls, and automated infrastructure provisioning.

projects.name: Enterprise Observability Framework
projects.impact: Improved debugging and incident resolution across 50+ microservices.
projects.description: Designed a centralized monitoring and observability platform implementing SLIs, SLOs, logging standards, and chaos engineering experiments.

projects.name: GitOps CI/CD Transformation
projects.impact: Increased release velocity by 300% through automated GitOps workflows.
projects.description: Implemented automated GitOps based deployment pipelines enabling push-to-deploy capabilities and standardized CI/CD pipelines.
